title: Non-record: TWEO early-cosine outlier regularization on SP1024 baseline
author: PapaFranku4647

data.description: Repeated a small middle portion of the stack, with recurrence enabled only mid-training and MLPs untied in the repeated block.
Split attention and MLP into separate residual lanes starting from a later layer, with learned routing between lanes.

novel_contributions: Mixed-quantization GPTQ path with autoregressive self-generated calibration
Parallel residual lanes for attention and MLP starting at layer 7
Mini depth recurrence over layers 4 and 5
Untying repeated MLP weights in the recurrent block
